summary: Retest after ObjectId serialization fix. ObjectId/_id bug is FIXED: POST /checkins, /kasir, /expenses now return 200 with clean JSON. However, a NEW (separate) bug found in POST /checkins/{id}/checkout — endpoint references body.pembayaran while the Pydantic model CheckoutIn defines the field as metode_pembayaran -> AttributeError -> 500. This blocks checkout, housekeeping-done, and insufficient-payment 400 tests.
passed: POST /api/checkins -> 200 (ObjectId bug fixed; clean JSON, no _id leaked)
POST /api/kasir with valid items + split payment (tunai+qris) -> 200 (ObjectId bug fixed)

failed.issue: Endpoint crashes with 500. Backend log: AttributeError: 'CheckoutIn' object has no attribute 'pembayaran' at server.py:490 `total_bayar = sum(int(p.get('jumlah', 0)) for p in body.pembayaran)`. The Pydantic model CheckoutIn (server.py:128-131) defines the field as `metode_pembayaran: List[Dict[str, Any]]`, but the handler reads `body.pembayaran`. Field name mismatch.
failed.evidence: POST /api/checkins/{id}/checkout with body {"metode_pembayaran":[{"metode":"tunai","jumlah":100000}]} -> HTTP 500; traceback in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log

failed.issue: Could not be validated because checkout never completes (room stays in day_use, never enters perlu_dibersihkan). Endpoint itself returned the expected 400 'Kamar tidak dalam status Perlu Dibersihkan' when called against a day_use room, so guard works; happy path untested.
Cannot be tested because checkout always 500s due to the field-name bug above.

action_items: In /app/backend/server.py checkout handler (around line 490), rename `body.pembayaran` references to `body.metode_pembayaran` (the field declared on CheckoutIn). Audit the whole checkout function for any other `body.pembayaran` references and the persisted field name used in the checkin doc/audit log.
After fix, re-run full flow: checkin -> checkout insufficient (400) -> checkout success (200, room=perlu_dibersihkan) -> housekeeping-done (200, room=kosong).

success_rate.backend: ~80% (ObjectId regressions fixed; one new blocker on checkout)
